danger_signals.visual_form: Dinosaurs (small ones popping from eggs), spiders, saber-tooth tigers, prehistoric monsters
danger_signals.meaning: Hazard zones requiring evasion or combat

danger_signals.visual_form: Falling rocks and debris from top of screen, dangerous terrain in swamps and graveyard
danger_signals.meaning: Damage or death if contact made
Major threat requiring defeat to progress

danger_signals.visual_form: Creepy dinosaur graveyard world with skeletal/death imagery

safety_signals.visual_form: Rocks that can be picked up and held
safety_signals.meaning: Shield from falling hazards; player agency in defense
Safe passage aids; environmental trust signals
Stable progression paths; bonus item accessibility
Safe zones exist where rewards can be obtained

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Rock-throwing caveman; punk mohawk; beer belly
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Appears in band context (guitarist/shouter); associated with primitive tools (rocks, boulders)
Last seen in graveyard; kidnapped state defines rescue narrative

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Jealous local bully; pun-based naming (Gary Glitter reference)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Creepy dinosaur graveyard hang-out; kidnapper presence marks danger zone

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Primeval jungle vegetation; dense plant life; tropical setting
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Early-stage enemies (small dinosaurs, basic hazards); tutorial-level threats

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Underground cavern aesthetic; rock formations; enclosed spaces
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Mid-stage difficulty; spiders and cave-dwelling creatures

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Swamp/lake environments; water hazards; aquatic visual styling
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Water-based obstacles; crocodile seesaw mechanics; aquatic creature encounters

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ice-capped mountain top; snow/frost visual effects; arctic coloring
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Late-stage hazards; slippery terrain mechanics; intense environmental threats

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Creepy dinosaur graveyard; skeletal remains; death imagery; ominous atmosphere
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss battle arena; Gary Gritter final confrontation; maximum difficulty; Ophelia rescue location

environmental_storytelling.example: Five distinct worlds (Jungle→Cave→Water→Ice→Graveyard) create escalating danger and story arc leading to kidnapper's lair
Chuck's appearance (balding punk mohawk, overweight, loutish) communicates 1990s lad culture and primitive-meets-modern aesthetic
Gary Gritter's hideout in 'creepy dinosaur graveyard' signals this as the danger culmination; graveyard imagery foreshadows final confrontation
Saber-tooth tigers, woolly mammoth, dinosaurs in jungle/cave contexts create prehistoric consistency; enemies match world biome
Parallax scrolling (in most versions) creates depth perception; rocks as shields/platforms show environment as both threat and resource

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Walks, jumps, thrusts beer belly to attack, kicks while airborne, picks up and throws rocks/boulders
Passive state; relies on flying lizard or brontosaurus for safe traversal
Pop out of eggs; actively pursue/threaten player
Cave-dwelling; patrol/attack behavior in confined spaces
Serves as seesaw platform; environmental tool rather than enemy
Final confrontation; climactic threat requiring defeat; guards Ophelia

notes: Chuck Rock uses archetypal Stone Age setting with anachronistic elements (TV, rock band, modern slang via 'Unga Bunga') to create humorous world-state. World progression follows geographical/climatic escalation (jungle→arctic→graveyard) mirroring narrative intensity. Visual communication relies heavily on character design (protagonist loutishness), location theming, and enemy type-to-environment matching rather than explicit UI elements. The game communicates danger through enemy presence and environmental hazard placement, and safety through interactive elements (rocks, allied creatures) that empower player agency.
